Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails with a query related to "Derek Liu" or "Terraform" or "portal access" or "stipend portal" (or similar) using search_emails to find Derek Liu's escalation email (email-terraform-compound-escalation-20260425) sent from derek.liu@terraformdigital.com to julian.brooks@moveops.com, CC rachel.nguyen@terraformdigital.com and elena.rostova@moveops.com. The email reports that multiple Terraform Digital employees and contractors onboarded in the past week are not appearing in the MoveOps stipend portal or are showing as inactive. Derek names Priya Dasgupta specifically, she is scheduled for a May 5 relocation to Chicago and cannot submit pre-move stipend claims. Derek gives a 48-hour deadline before escalating directly to Elena Rostova.
OE 2: Search emails with a query related to "Terraform" or "portal" or "inactive" or "contractor" (or similar) using search_emails to find the earlier access complaint from Alex Mercer (alex.mercer@terraformdigital.com), a Terraform Digital contractor, sent to omar.ibrahim@moveops.com on April 24 (email_td_contractor_access_20260424). The email reports that Alex's account shows inactive when he tries to sign in, confirming that the access issue predates Derek's escalation and is not limited to a single user.
OE 3: Search Slack with a query related to "Terraform" or "portal" or "access" or "contractor" (or similar) using conversations_search_messages, or retrieve conversation history of channel C007 (#customer-support) using conversations_history, to find Omar Ibrahim's April 24 post (ts: 1777036620.000000) where he reports a Terraform Digital portal access complaint from a contractor but treats it as a routine one-off provisioning mismatch. Omar advises the contractor to have Terraform IT re-provision the account, missing that this is a systemic issue.
OE 4: Search Slack with a query related to "credential" or "security" or "deploy" or "rotation" (or similar) using conversations_search_messages, or retrieve conversation history of channel C003 (#engineering) using conversations_history, to find Lena Bjorkstrom's April 23 post (ts: 1776935400.000000) announcing the security/stability deployment: credential rotation for third-party integrations, tightening secret access, and cleanup of stale service keys left over from the auto-categorizer recovery work. Also find Samira Tariq's follow-up message (ts: 1776936600.000000) asking Lena to confirm no customer-facing services were impacted, and Lena's reply (ts: 1776937020.000000) stating that the BambooHR import runs overnight and is not part of the live customer-facing surface, she classified the deploy as not affecting client access.
OE 5: Search Slack with a query related to "BambooHR" or "Terraform" or "auth" or "import" (or similar) using conversations_search_messages in channel C003 (#engineering) to find Lena Bjorkstrom's late-night April 23 post (ts: 1776979440.000000) reporting that Terraform Digital's overnight BambooHR import is throwing authentication errors after the credential rotation. Lena notes that portal status checks are still green, so the impact may be limited to newly added employees and contractors not appearing in MoveOps until the connection is reauthorized.
OE 6: Search Linear for existing tickets related to the BambooHR sync failure using linear_list_issues with a query related to "BambooHR" or "Terraform" or "credential rotation" (or similar). Find two relevant tickets: (1) linear_issue_td_security_rotation_20260423, "Rotate third-party integration credentials and remove stale service keys" (ENG-611, priority 2/High, assigned to Lena Bjorkstrom, team: Engineering), and (2) linear_issue_td_bamboohr_sync_auth_20260424, "Terraform Digital BambooHR nightly import failing with authentication after credential rotation" (ENG-318, priority 2/High, assigned to Lena Bjorkstrom, team: Engineering). The BambooHR sync ticket is linked to the credential rotation ticket. Note: neither ticket is P1/Urgent, they are both priority 2 (High).
OE 7: Read comments on the BambooHR sync failure ticket using linear_list_comments (issueId: linear_issue_td_bamboohr_sync_auth_20260424) to find: (1) Lena Bjorkstrom's comment (April 24, 01:21) noting the overnight BambooHR job failed on auth, consistent with the third-party credential cleanup from the previous day, and that customer impact may be limited to newly added people not appearing in MoveOps until the connection is reauthorized; and (2) Samira Tariq's comment (April 24, 09:26) noting a monitoring gap, the alerting items committed to after the March AWS cost spike are still incomplete, so no automated alerting would have surfaced this failure.
OE 8: Look up the Terraform Digital account in CRM using crm_search_companies with a query related to "Terraform" or "Vantage Distributed" (or similar). Find the company record (company-terraform-digital, listed as "Vantage Distributed" in CRM, 1,200 employees, Chicago). Search for associated deals using crm_search_deals to find: (1) deal-terraform-digital-001, "Vantage Distributed - Enterprise Relocation Package" ($1,850,000, closedwon), and (2) deal-terraform-q2-reloc-batch1, "Terraform Digital, Q2 2026 Relocation Batch 1 (3 employees)" ($7,500, qualification stage). Check engagement history using crm_list_engagements to find existing engagement notes including the Reply-All pricing leak incident and Priya Dasgupta's active relocation context.
OE 9: Look up Derek Liu's contact details using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Derek Liu") to find derek.liu@terraformdigital.com, Head of IT at Terraform Digital (contact_id: contact_derek_liu_terraform_digital). This confirms the sender of the escalation email and the correct email address for the reply.
OE 10: Reply to Derek Liu's escalation email using reply_to_email (email_id: email-terraform-compound-escalation-20260425, sender: julian.brooks@moveops.com). Content should provide a clear, honest, and specific explanation of the root cause: a platform security update on April 23 inadvertently invalidated the BambooHR API token used by the Terraform Digital nightly employee sync, causing all employees and contractors added since April 23 to not appear in the MoveOps stipend portal. The reply should include a specific timeline for resolution, acknowledge Priya Dasgupta's situation and the urgency of her May 5 relocation, and confirm that engineering is actively working on reauthorizing the BambooHR connection.
OE 11: Create a P1 incident ticket using linear_create_issue (team: team_engineering, title related to "Terraform Digital portal access, BambooHR sync failure customer escalation" or similar, priority: 1/Urgent, description covering: Derek Liu's escalation, multiple affected users, Priya Dasgupta's blocked May 5 relocation, root cause tracing to April 23 credential rotation, 48-hour deadline from client) OR upgrade the existing BambooHR sync ticket from priority 2 to priority 1 using linear_update_issue (id: linear_issue_td_bamboohr_sync_auth_20260424, priority: 1). The existing ticket tracks the technical failure but is only High priority, the customer-facing escalation warrants Urgent/P1.
OE 12: Post a message in channel C003 (#engineering) using conversations_add_message to notify Samira Tariq's engineering team about the incident. Content should cover: Derek Liu's escalation from Terraform Digital (biggest client), root cause identified as April 23 credential rotation breaking the BambooHR API sync, multiple users affected since April 23 including Priya Dasgupta with an active May 5 relocation, 48-hour resolution deadline before client escalates to Elena, and confirmation that a P1 incident ticket has been created or upgraded.
OE 13: Update the Terraform Digital CRM account by creating an engagement using crm_create_engagement (company_ids: ["company-terraform-digital"], engagement_type: "NOTE" or similar, body covering: Derek Liu's April 25 portal access escalation, root cause identified as BambooHR sync failure from credential rotation, multiple users affected, Priya Dasgupta's May 5 relocation blocked, 48-hour deadline, P1 engineering ticket created, resolution in progress). This ensures Mina Hashimoto (Terraform AM) and David Chen (CE Lead) have visibility into the escalation if Rachel Nguyen or Derek Liu contacts them.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

outcome
 ✓✓✓✓✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The reply explicitly states: 'On April 23, our engineering team deployed a scheduled credential rotation for third-party integrations...That rotation inadvertently broke the authentication token for Terraform Digital's BambooHR API connection — the integration that syncs your HR system with our stipend portal. The overnight import job that provisions new and updated user accounts has been failing with authentication errors since April 23.'
✓Run #2The reply explicitly states: 'On April 23, our engineering team deployed a scheduled credential rotation for third-party integrations. That rotation inadvertently broke the authentication token for the nightly BambooHR import that syncs Terraform Digital's employee and contractor records into the MoveOps stipend portal.'
✓Run #3The reply content explicitly explains: 'On April 23, our engineering team deployed a planned credential rotation for our third-party integrations... That rotation inadvertently broke the authentication between our platform and Terraform Digital's BambooHR instance. The nightly sync job that imports new and updated employee/contractor records into our stipend portal has been failing since April 23.'
✓Run #4The reply to Derek explicitly states: 'On April 23, our engineering team performed a routine credential rotation for third-party integrations. This inadvertently broke the authentication token for Terraform Digital's BambooHR nightly import — the job that syncs new and updated employee/contractor records into the MoveOps stipend portal.'
✓Run #5The reply content explicitly states: 'on April 23, our engineering team deployed a scheduled credential rotation for third-party integrations. That rotation inadvertently broke the authentication token for Terraform Digital's BambooHR nightly import.' Root cause is clearly and accurately explained.
✓Run #6The reply body explicitly states: 'On April 23, our engineering team deployed a scheduled credential rotation for third-party integrations. That rotation inadvertently broke the authentication on the overnight BambooHR import that syncs Terraform Digital's employee and contractor records into our portal.'
3 The reply to Derek Liu (visible in reply_to_email or send_email parameters) includes a specific resolution timeline or ETA for when the portal access issue will be fixed, rather than a generic 'we are looking into it' statement.
